emails.subject: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.subject_base: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.body: Yes, they are deducting for parking How do I get on the list for the form? Could you pretty please check for me? Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Re: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.subject_base: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.body: Re: Yes, they are deducting for parking Let me see what I can do. I can't believe you haven't gotten any kind of notice. I still need your credit card information for the phone bill. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/31/2001 09:03 AM

emails.subject: Re: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.subject_base: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.body: This place amazes me! Thanks for your help. I have no patience for it. We went to Michael's school conference today. His teacher raved about how everyone just loves Michael. He is so sweet. He is staying with my folks this week, and the 3 of us miss him so badly. I can't wait for him to come home. Neil is going to meet my folks and Michael in Palacios this Friday, and spend the weekend there, bringing him home on Sunday. I've got to take Roscoe for his last mange shot, so I'm staying. Plus, I spent last weekend with my folks, and too much exposure doesn't work for us. I hope to PURGE the house of all the junk I have. I hope it is raining, because that is great cleaning weather. I want to see bare space in my closet. I think I'll call the Women's Center and see what type of stuff they need. I'm planning on taking next Thursday and Friday off. Next Thursday is Paige's 21st birthday, so we have great plans. Do you know anywhere that can enlarge a photo and mount it on a board? I still get a bill for the card they used previously for my phone. Go figure. I need to send off my Tx tax and bar dues today. I'll want to fed ex, just in case you are sending anyone else's today. Thanks, Kay From: Suzanne Adams@ECT on 05/31/2001 09:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.subject_base: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.body: You definitely have to have patience to deal with all the "stuff" around here. It's a good thing I've mellowed. Plus, it's my job. Michael is a doll! I don't think it's supposed to rain on Saturday, but that could change at any moment. The Women's Center needs all kinds of things. I have a friend that works for the United Way and goes over there quite often. If you have clothes, they want you to take them to their Resale shop but they also need linens, just everything really. I usually give my things to Kristine's church just because I always forget to put them in the truck and bring up here. I've got next Thursday and Friday on my calendar. I hope you guys have a great time. 21, I remember that, wild child that I was! Any of the camera places should be able to do that enlargement. I know Wolfe Camera over at Allen Center does that type of thing. I don't know how long it will take to get it back. What exactly do you want to get done, and I'll call and inquire. I'll need the size you want it mounted to also. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/31/2001 09:21 AM

emails.subject: Re: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.subject_base: Yes, they are deducting for parking
emails.body: You are very welcome. Don't forget about your statement for your phone bill so we can get that submitted too. I don't like you paying these bills with your own money. I don't know why it bothers me, but it does (per Daphne on Frasier). Kay Mann@ENRON 05/31/2001 10:46 AM
